name: claude-hunter
description: One-stop offensive security skill bundle for bug bounty hunting, external red team assessments, and web application pentesting. 55 skills covering 27 vulnerability classes, enterprise platform attacks (M365/Okta/VPN/vCenter), red team tradecraft, 574+ disclosed-report patterns, 7-Question validation gate, and multi-platform reporting (H1/Bugcrowd/Intigriti/Immunefi).
